chapters.zh: 奉神旨意，作基督耶稣使徒的保罗和兄弟提摩太
chapters.en: Paul, an apostle of Jesus Christ by the will of God, and Timotheus brother,

chapters.zh: 写信给歌罗西的圣徒，在基督里有忠心的弟兄。愿恩惠、平安从神我们的父归与你们！
chapters.en: To the saints and faithful brethren in Christ which are at Colosse: Grace unto you, and peace, from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.

chapters.zh: 我们感谢神、我们主耶稣基督的父，常常为你们祷告；
chapters.en: We give thanks to God and the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, praying always for you,

chapters.zh: 因听见你们在基督耶稣里的信心，并向众圣徒的爱心，
chapters.en: Since we heard of your faith in Christ Jesus, and of the love to all the saints,

chapters.zh: 是为那给你们存在天上的盼望；这盼望就是你们从前在福音真理的道上所听见的。
chapters.en: For the hope which is laid up for you in heaven, whereof ye heard before in the word of the truth of the gospel;

chapters.zh: 这福音传到你们那里，也传到普天之下，并且结果，增长，如同在你们中间，自从你们听见福音，真知道神恩惠的日子一样。
chapters.en: Which is come unto you, as in all the world; and bringeth forth fruit, as also in you, since the day ye heard , and knew the grace of God in truth:

chapters.zh: 正如你们从我们所亲爱、一同作仆人的以巴弗所学的。他为我们（有古卷：你们）作了基督忠心的执事，
chapters.en: As ye also learned of Epaphras our dear fellowservant, who is for you a faithful minister of Christ;

chapters.zh: 也把你们因圣灵所存的爱心告诉了我们。
chapters.en: Who also declared unto us your love in the Spirit.

chapters.zh: 因此，我们自从听见的日子，也就为你们不住的祷告祈求，愿你们在一切属灵的智慧悟性上，满心知道神的旨意；
chapters.en: For this cause we also, since the day we heard , do not cease to pray for you, and to desire that ye might be filled with the knowledge of his will in all wisdom and spiritual understanding;

chapters.zh: 好叫你们行事为人对得起主，凡事蒙他喜悦，在一切善事上结果子，渐渐的多知道神；
chapters.en: That ye might walk worthy of the Lord unto all pleasing, being fruitful in every good work, and increasing in the knowledge of God;

chapters.zh: 照他荣耀的权能，得以在各样的力上加力，好叫你们凡事欢欢喜喜的忍耐宽容；
chapters.en: Strengthened with all might, according to his glorious power, unto all patience and longsuffering with joyfulness;

chapters.zh: 又感谢父，叫我们能与众圣徒在光明中同得基业。
chapters.en: Giving thanks unto the Father, which hath made us meet to be partakers of the inheritance of the saints in light:

chapters.zh: 他救了我们脱离黑暗的权势，把我们迁到他爱子的国里；
chapters.en: Who hath delivered us from the power of darkness, and hath translated into the kingdom of his dear Son:

chapters.zh: 我们在爱子里得蒙救赎，罪过得以赦免。
chapters.en: In whom we have redemption through his blood, the forgiveness of sins:

chapters.zh: 爱子是那不能看见之神的像，是首生的，在一切被造的以先。
chapters.en: Who is the image of the invisible God, the firstborn of every creature:

chapters.zh: 因为万有都是靠他造的，无论是天上的，地上的；能看见的，不能看见的；或是有位的，主治的，执政的，掌权的；一概都是藉著他造的，又是为他造的。
chapters.en: For by him were all things created, that are in heaven, and that are in earth, visible and invisible, whether thrones, or dominions, or principalities, or powers: all things were created by him, and for him:

chapters.zh: 他在万有之先；万有也靠他而立。
chapters.en: And he is before all things, and by him all things consist.

chapters.zh: 他也是教会全体之首。他是元始，是从死里首先复生的，使他可以在凡事上居首位。
chapters.en: And he is the head of the body, the church: who is the beginning, the firstborn from the dead; that in all he might have the preeminence.

chapters.zh: 因为父喜欢叫一切的丰盛在他里面居住。
chapters.en: For it pleased that in him should all fulness dwell;

chapters.zh: 既然藉著他在十字架上所流的血成就了和平，便藉著他叫万有 ─ 无论是地上的、天上的 ─ 都与自己和好了。
chapters.en: And, having made peace through the blood of his cross, by him to reconcile all things unto himself; by him, , whether things in earth, or things in heaven.

chapters.zh: 你们从前与神隔绝，因著恶行，心里与他为敌。
chapters.en: And you, that were sometime alienated and enemies in mind by wicked works, yet now hath he reconciled

chapters.zh: 但如今他藉著基督的肉身受死，叫你们与自己和好，都成了圣洁，没有瑕疵，无可责备，把你们引到自己面前。
chapters.en: In the body of his flesh through death, to present you holy and unblameable and unreproveable in his sight:

chapters.zh: 只要你们在所信的道上恒心，根基稳固，坚定不移，不至被引动失去（原文是离开）福音的盼望。这福音就是你们所听过的，也是传与普天下万人听的（原文是凡受造的），我保罗也作了这福音的执事。
chapters.en: If ye continue in the faith grounded and settled, and not moved away from the hope of the gospel, which ye have heard, which was preached to every creature which is under heaven; whereof I Paul am made a minister;

chapters.zh: 现在我为你们受苦，倒觉欢乐；并且为基督的身体，就是为教会，要在我肉身上补满基督患难的缺欠。
chapters.en: Who now rejoice in my sufferings for you, and fill up that which is behind of the afflictions of Christ in my flesh for his body's sake, which is the church:

chapters.zh: 我照神为你们所赐我的职分作了教会的执事，要把神的道理传得全备，
chapters.en: Whereof I am made a minister, according to the dispensation of God which is given to me for you, to fulfil the word of God;

chapters.zh: 这道理就是历世历代所隐藏的奥秘；但如今向他的圣徒显明了。
chapters.en: the mystery which hath been hid from ages and from generations, but now is made manifest to his saints:

chapters.zh: 神愿意叫他们知道，这奥秘在外邦人中有何等丰盛的荣耀，就是基督在你们心里成了有荣耀的盼望。
chapters.en: To whom God would make known what the riches of the glory of this mystery among the Gentiles; which is Christ in you, the hope of glory:

chapters.zh: 我们传扬他，是用诸般的智慧，劝戒各人，教导各人，要把各人在基督里完完全全的引到神面前。
chapters.en: Whom we preach, warning every man, and teaching every man in all wisdom; that we may present every man perfect in Christ Jesus:

chapters.zh: 我也为此劳苦，照著他在我 � 面运用的大能尽心竭力。
chapters.en: Whereunto I also labour, striving according to his working, which worketh in me mightily.

chapters.zh: 我愿意你们晓得，我为你们和老底嘉人，并一切没有与我亲自见面的人，是何等的尽心竭力；
chapters.en: For I would that ye knew what great conflict I have for you, and them at Laodicea, and as many as have not seen my face in the flesh;

chapters.zh: 要叫他们的心得安慰，因爱心互相联络，以致丰丰足足在悟性中有充足的信心，使他们真知神的奥秘，就是基督；
chapters.en: That their hearts might be comforted, being knit together in love, and unto all riches of the full assurance of understanding, to the acknowledgement of the mystery of God, and of the Father, and of Christ;

chapters.zh: 所积蓄的一切智慧知识，都在他里面藏著。
chapters.en: In whom are hid all the treasures of wisdom and knowledge.

chapters.zh: 我说这话，免得有人用花言巧语迷惑你们。
chapters.en: And this I say, lest any man should beguile you with enticing words.

chapters.zh: 我身子虽与你们相离，心却与你们同在，见你们循规蹈矩，信基督的心也坚固，我就欢喜了。
chapters.en: For though I be absent in the flesh, yet am I with you in the spirit, joying and beholding your order, and the stedfastness of your faith in Christ.

chapters.zh: 你们既然接受了主基督耶稣，就当遵他而行，
chapters.en: As ye have therefore received Christ Jesus the Lord, walk ye in him:

chapters.zh: 在他里面生根建造，信心坚固，正如你们所领的教训，感谢的心也更增长了。
chapters.en: Rooted and built up in him, and stablished in the faith, as ye have been taught, abounding therein with thanksgiving.

chapters.zh: 你们要谨慎，恐怕有人用他的理学和虚空的妄言，不照著基督，乃照人间的遗传和世上的小学就把你们掳去。
chapters.en: Beware lest any man spoil you through philosophy and vain deceit, after the tradition of men, after the rudiments of the world, and not after Christ.

chapters.zh: 因为神本性一切的丰盛都有形有体的居住在基督里面，
chapters.en: For in him dwelleth all the fulness of the Godhead bodily.

chapters.zh: 你们在他里面也得了丰盛。他是各样执政掌权者的元首。
chapters.en: And ye are complete in him, which is the head of all principality and power:

chapters.zh: 你们在他里面也受了不是人手所行的割礼，乃是基督使你们脱去肉体情欲的割礼。
chapters.en: In whom also ye are circumcised with the circumcision made without hands, in putting off the body of the sins of the flesh by the circumcision of Christ:

chapters.zh: 你们既受洗与他一同埋葬，也就在此与他一同复活，都因信那叫他从死里复活神的功用。
chapters.en: Buried with him in baptism, wherein also ye are risen with through the faith of the operation of God, who hath raised him from the dead.

chapters.zh: 你们从前在过犯和未受割礼的肉体中死了，神赦免了你们（或作：我们）一切过犯，便叫你们与基督一同活过来；
chapters.en: And you, being dead in your sins and the uncircumcision of your flesh, hath he quickened together with him, having forgiven you all trespasses;

chapters.zh: 又涂抹了在律例上所写攻击我们，有碍于我们的字据，把他撤去，钉在十字架上。
chapters.en: Blotting out the handwriting of ordinances that was against us, which was contrary to us, and took it out of the way, nailing it to his cross;

chapters.zh: 既将一切执政的、掌权的掳来，明显给众人看，就仗著十字架夸胜。
chapters.en: having spoiled principalities and powers, he made a shew of them openly, triumphing over them in it.

chapters.zh: 所以，不拘在饮食上，或节期、月朔、安息日都不可让人论断你们。
chapters.en: Let no man therefore judge you in meat, or in drink, or in respect of an holyday, or of the new moon, or of the sabbath :

chapters.zh: 这些原是后事的影儿；那形体却是基督。
chapters.en: Which are a shadow of things to come; but the body of Christ.

chapters.zh: 不可让人因著故意谦虚和敬拜天使，就夺去你们的奖赏。这等人拘泥在所见过的（有古卷作：这等人窥察所没有见过的），随著自己的欲心，无故的自高自大，
chapters.en: Let no man beguile you of your reward in a voluntary humility and worshipping of angels, intruding into those things which he hath not seen, vainly puffed up by his fleshly mind,

chapters.zh: 不持定元首。全身既然靠著他，筋节得以相助联络，就因神大得长进。
chapters.en: And not holding the Head, from which all the body by joints and bands having nourishment ministered, and knit together, increaseth with the increase of God.

chapters.zh: 你们若是与基督同死，脱离了世上的小学，为甚么仍像在世俗中活著、服从那不可拿、不可尝、不可摸等类的规条呢？
chapters.en: Wherefore if ye be dead with Christ from the rudiments of the world, why, as though living in the world, are ye subject to ordinances,

chapters.zh: a
chapters.en: (Touch not; taste not; handle not;

chapters.zh: 这都是照人所吩咐、所教导的。说到这一切，正用的时候就都败坏了。
chapters.en: Which all are to perish with the using;) after the commandments and doctrines of men?

chapters.zh: 这些规条使人徒有智慧之名，用私意崇拜，自表谦卑，苦待己身，其实在克制肉体的情欲上是毫无功效。
chapters.en: Which things have indeed a shew of wisdom in will worship, and humility, and neglecting of the body; not in any honour to the satisfying of the flesh.

chapters.zh: 所以，你们若真与基督一同复活，就当求在上面的事；那里有基督坐在神的右边。
chapters.en: If ye then be risen with Christ, seek those things which are above, where Christ sitteth on the right hand of God.

chapters.zh: 你们要思念上面的事，不要思念地上的事。
chapters.en: Set your affection on things above, not on things on the earth.

chapters.zh: 因为你们已经死了，你们的生命与基督一同藏在神里面。
chapters.en: For ye are dead, and your life is hid with Christ in God.

chapters.zh: 基督是我们的生命，他显现的时候，你们也要与他一同显现在荣耀里。
chapters.en: When Christ, our life, shall appear, then shall ye also appear with him in glory.

chapters.zh: 所以，要治死你们在地上的肢体，就如淫乱、污秽、邪情、恶欲，和贪婪。贪婪就与拜偶像一样。
chapters.en: Mortify therefore your members which are upon the earth; fornication, uncleanness, inordinate affection, evil concupiscence, and covetousness, which is idolatry:

chapters.zh: 因这些事，神的忿怒必临到那悖逆之子。
chapters.en: For which things' sake the wrath of God cometh on the children of disobedience:

chapters.zh: 当你们在这些事中活著的时候，也曾这样行过。
chapters.en: In the which ye also walked some time, when ye lived in them.

chapters.zh: 但现在你们要弃绝这一切的事，以及恼恨、忿怒、恶毒（或作：阴毒）、毁谤，并口中污秽的言语。
chapters.en: But now ye also put off all these; anger, wrath, malice, blasphemy, filthy communication out of your mouth.

chapters.zh: 不要彼此说谎；因你们已经脱去旧人和旧人的行为，
chapters.en: Lie not one to another, seeing that ye have put off the old man with his deeds;

chapters.zh: 穿上了新人。这新人在知识上渐渐更新，正如造他主的形像。
chapters.en: And have put on the new , which is renewed in knowledge after the image of him that created him:

chapters.zh: 在此并不分希利尼人、犹太人，受割礼的、未受割礼的，化外人，西古提人，为奴的、自主的，惟有基督是包括一切，又住在各人之内。
chapters.en: Where there is neither Greek nor Jew, circumcision nor uncircumcision, Barbarian, Scythian, bond free: but Christ all, and in all.

chapters.zh: 所以，你们既是神的选民，圣洁蒙爱的人，就要存（原文作穿；下同）怜悯、恩慈、谦虚、温柔、忍耐的心。
chapters.en: Put on therefore, as the elect of God, holy and beloved, bowels of mercies, kindness, humbleness of mind, meekness, longsuffering;

chapters.zh: 倘若这人与那人有嫌隙，总要彼此包容，彼此饶恕；主怎样饶恕了你们，你们也要怎样饶恕人。
chapters.en: Forbearing one another, and forgiving one another, if any man have a quarrel against any: even as Christ forgave you, so also ye.

chapters.zh: 在这一切之外，要存著爱心，爱心就是联络全德的。
chapters.en: And above all these things charity, which is the bond of perfectness.

chapters.zh: 又要叫基督的平安在你们心里作主；你们也为此蒙召，归为一体；且要存感谢的心。
chapters.en: And let the peace of God rule in your hearts, to the which also ye are called in one body; and be ye thankful.

chapters.zh: 当用各样的智慧，把基督的道理丰丰富富的存在心里，（或作：当把基督的道理丰丰富富的存在心里，以各样的智慧），用诗章、颂词、灵歌，彼此教导，互相劝戒，心被恩感，歌颂神。
chapters.en: Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly in all wisdom; teaching and admonishing one another in psalms and hymns and spiritual songs, singing with grace in your hearts to the Lord.

chapters.zh: 无论做甚么，或说话或行事，都要奉主耶稣的名，藉著他感谢父神。
chapters.en: And whatsoever ye do in word or deed, all in the name of the Lord Jesus, giving thanks to God and the Father by him.

chapters.zh: 你们作妻子的，当顺服自己的丈夫，这在主里面是相宜的。
chapters.en: Wives, submit yourselves unto your own husbands, as it is fit in the Lord.

chapters.zh: 你们作丈夫的，要爱你们的妻子，不可苦待他们。
chapters.en: Husbands, love wives, and be not bitter against them.

chapters.zh: 你们作儿女的，要凡事听从父母，因为这是主所喜悦的。
chapters.en: Children, obey parents in all things: for this is well pleasing unto the Lord.

chapters.zh: 你们作父亲的，不要惹儿女的气，恐怕他们失了志气。
chapters.en: Fathers, provoke not your children , lest they be discouraged.

chapters.zh: 你们作仆人的，要凡事听从你们肉身的主人，不要只在眼前事奉，像是讨人喜欢的，总要存心诚实敬畏主。
chapters.en: Servants, obey in all things masters according to the flesh; not with eyeservice, as menpleasers; but in singleness of heart, fearing God:

chapters.zh: 无论做甚么，都要从心里做，像是给主做的，不是给人做的，
chapters.en: And whatsoever ye do, do heartily, as to the Lord, and not unto men;

chapters.zh: 因你们知道从主那里必得著基业为赏赐；你们所事奉的乃是主基督。
chapters.en: Knowing that of the Lord ye shall receive the reward of the inheritance: for ye serve the Lord Christ.

chapters.zh: 那行不义的必受不义的报应；主并不偏待人。
chapters.en: But he that doeth wrong shall receive for the wrong which he hath done: and there is no respect of persons.

chapters.zh: 你们作主人的，要公公平平的待仆人，因为知道你们也有一位主在天上。
chapters.en: Masters, give unto servants that which is just and equal; knowing that ye also have a Master in heaven.

chapters.zh: 你们要恒切祷告，在此儆醒感恩。
chapters.en: Continue in prayer, and watch in the same with thanksgiving;

chapters.zh: 也要为我们祷告，求神给我们开传道的门，能以讲基督的奥秘（我为此被捆锁），
chapters.en: Withal praying also for us, that God would open unto us a door of utterance, to speak the mystery of Christ, for which I am also in bonds:

chapters.zh: 叫我按著所该说的话将这奥秘发明出来。
chapters.en: That I may make it manifest, as I ought to speak.

chapters.zh: 你们要爱惜光阴，用智慧与外人交往。
chapters.en: Walk in wisdom toward them that are without, redeeming the time.

chapters.zh: 你们的言语要常常带著和气，好像用盐调和，就可知道该怎样回答各人。
chapters.en: Let your speech alway with grace, seasoned with salt, that ye may know how ye ought to answer every man.

chapters.zh: 有我亲爱的兄弟推基古要将我一切的事都告诉你们。他是忠心的执事，和我一同作主的仆人，
chapters.en: All my state shall Tychicus declare unto you, a beloved brother, and a faithful minister and fellowservant in the Lord:

chapters.zh: 我特意打发他到你们那里去，好叫你们知道我们的光景，又叫他安慰你们的心。
chapters.en: Whom I have sent unto you for the same purpose, that he might know your estate, and comfort your hearts;

chapters.zh: 我又打发一位亲爱忠心的兄弟阿尼西母同去；他也是你们那里的人。他们要把这里一切的事都告诉你们。
chapters.en: With Onesimus, a faithful and beloved brother, who is of you. They shall make known unto you all things which here.

chapters.zh: 与我一同坐监的亚里达古问你们安。巴拿巴的表弟马可也问你们安。（说到这马可，你们已经受了吩咐；他若到了你们那里，你们就接待他。）
chapters.en: Aristarchus my fellowprisoner saluteth you, and Marcus, sister's son to Barnabas, (touching whom ye received commandments: if he come unto you, receive him;)

chapters.zh: 耶数又称为犹士都，也问你们安。奉割礼的人中，只有这三个人是为神的国与我一同做工的，也是叫我心里得安慰的。
chapters.en: And Jesus, which is called Justus, who are of the circumcision. These only fellowworkers unto the kingdom of God, which have been a comfort unto me.

chapters.zh: 有你们那里的人，作基督耶稣仆人的以巴弗问你们安。他在祷告之间，常为你们竭力的祈求，愿你们在神一切的旨意上得以完全，信心充足，能站立得稳。
chapters.en: Epaphras, who is of you, a servant of Christ, saluteth you, always labouring fervently for you in prayers, that ye may stand perfect and complete in all the will of God.

chapters.zh: 他为你们和老底嘉并希拉波立的弟兄多多的劳苦，这是我可以给他作见证的。
chapters.en: For I bear him record, that he hath a great zeal for you, and them in Laodicea, and them in Hierapolis.

chapters.zh: 所亲爱的医生路加和底马问你们安。
chapters.en: Luke, the beloved physician, and Demas, greet you.

chapters.zh: 请问老底嘉的弟兄和宁法，并他家里的教会安。
chapters.en: Salute the brethren which are in Laodicea, and Nymphas, and the church which is in his house.

chapters.zh: 你们念了这书信，便交给老底嘉的教会，叫他们也念；你们也要念从老底嘉来的书信。
chapters.en: And when this epistle is read among you, cause that it be read also in the church of the Laodiceans; and that ye likewise read the from Laodicea.

chapters.zh: 要对亚基布说：务要谨慎，尽你从主所受的职分。
chapters.en: And say to Archippus, Take heed to the ministry which thou hast received in the Lord, that thou fulfil it.

chapters.zh: 我保罗亲笔问你们安。你们要记念我的捆锁。愿恩惠常与你们同在！
chapters.en: The salutation by the hand of me Paul. Remember my bonds. Grace with you. Amen. « »
